---
title: "Week 1 — Reaction Time Exercise"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
  /* Hide Quarto's default content padding for this page */
  #quarto-content { padding: 0 !important; }

  .rt-wrap {
    font-family: "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif;
    background: #1a1a2e;
    color: white;
    min-height: 92vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
    touch-action: manipulation;
  }

  .rt-screen {
    display: none;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 36px 28px;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 520px;
    gap: 18px;
    animation: fadeIn 0.2s ease;
  }
  .rt-screen.active { display: flex; }

  @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } }

  .rt-wrap h1 { font-size: 1.6em; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.3; color: white; border: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  .rt-wrap h2 { font-size: 1.25em; font-weight: 600; color: white; margin: 0; }
  .rt-wrap p  { font-size: 0.95em; color: #aaa; line-height: 1.7; margin: 0; }

  .scenario-box {
    background: #2a2a3e;
    border-left: 4px solid #457b9d;
    border-radius: 6px;
    padding: 16px 18px;
    text-align: left;
    font-size: 0.9em;
    color: #ccc;
    line-height: 1.7;
  }
  .scenario-box strong { color: white; }

  .rt-wrap label { font-size: 0.85em; color: #aaa; align-self: flex-start; margin-bottom: -10px; }

  .rt-wrap input[type=text],
  .rt-wrap select {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 13px 15px;
    font-size: 1em;
    border: 2px solid #444;
    border-radius: 10px;
    background: #2a2a3e;
    color: white;
    outline: none;
  }
  .rt-wrap input[type=text]:focus,
  .rt-wrap select:focus { border-color: #457b9d; }
  .rt-wrap select option { background: #2a2a3e; }

  .rt-btn {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 15px;
    font-size: 1.05em;
    font-weight: 700;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 12px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: opacity 0.15s, transform 0.1s;
  }
  .rt-btn:active { opacity: 0.8; transform: scale(0.98); }
  .btn-blue  { background: #457b9d; color: white; }
  .btn-green { background: #2d6a4f; color: white; }

  /* Wait / Go screens */
  #rt-wait {
    background: #1a1a2e;
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    display: none;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    cursor: pointer;
    user-select: none;
    min-height: 92vh;
  }
  #rt-wait.active { display: flex; }

  #rt-go {
    background: #2d6a4f;
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    display: none;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    cursor: pointer;
    user-select: none;
    min-height: 92vh;
  }
  #rt-go.active { display: flex; }

  .big-label { font-size: 1em; color: #888; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .go-text   { font-size: 5em; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }
  .wait-text { font-size: 2.2em; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 10px; }
  .hint-text { font-size: 0.9em; color: #666; margin-top: 6px; }

  .too-early-msg {
    color: #e63946;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 1em;
    margin-top: 20px;
    animation: shake 0.35s ease;
  }
  @keyframes shake {
    0%,100% { transform: translateX(0); }
    25%      { transform: translateX(-10px); }
    75%      { transform: translateX(10px); }
  }

  .result-ms {
    font-size: 5em;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: #f4a261;
    line-height: 1;
  }
  .result-unit { font-size: 1em; color: #888; margin-top: -6px; }

  .times-grid {
    width: 100%;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    gap: 8px;
  }
  .time-row {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    background: #2a2a3e;
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 10px 16px;
    font-size: 0.92em;
  }
  .t-num { color: #666; }
  .t-val { font-weight: 700; color: #f4a261; }

  .submit-box {
    width: 100%;
    background: #1e3a2f;
    border: 1px solid #2d6a4f;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 16px;
    font-size: 0.88em;
    color: #aaa;
    line-height: 1.6;
    text-align: left;
  }
  .submit-box strong { color: white; display: block; margin-bottom: 4px; }

  .error-msg { color: #e63946; font-size: 0.85em; }
  .trial-badge {
    background: #2a2a3e;
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 5px 14px;
    font-size: 0.82em;
    color: #aaa;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }
</style>

<div class="rt-wrap" id="rt-wrap">

  <!-- ── Setup ── -->
  <div class="rt-screen active" id="rt-setup">
    <div class="scenario-box">
      A regional bank is reviewing performance data from its customer service centre.
      Response time — how quickly agents react to incoming alerts — is a key operational metric.
      HR currently records a <em>single</em> test score per agent during onboarding.<br><br>
      <strong>Your task:</strong> collect your own response time data and evaluate whether
      a single measurement is an adequate way to capture this metric.
    </div>
    <label>Your name</label>
    <input type="text" id="rt-name" placeholder="First name Last name" autocomplete="off">
    <label>Device you are using</label>
    <select id="rt-device">
      <option value="">Select…</option>
      <option value="Phone">Phone</option>
      <option value="Laptop">Laptop</option>
    </select>
    <button class="rt-btn btn-blue" onclick="rtSetup()">Continue →</button>
    <p id="rt-setup-err" class="error-msg" style="display:none">Please enter your name and select a device.</p>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Instructions ── -->
  <div class="rt-screen" id="rt-instructions">
    <h2>How it works</h2>
    <p>
      You will complete <strong style="color:white">10 trials</strong>.<br><br>
      The screen will turn <strong style="color:#2d6a4f">green</strong> after a random delay.
      Tap anywhere as fast as you can.<br><br>
      Note down each time as it appears — you'll need them at the end.
    </p>
    <button class="rt-btn btn-green" onclick="rtBegin()">Start trials</button>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Wait ── -->
  <div id="rt-wait" onclick="rtTooEarly()">
    <div class="big-label">Trial <span id="wait-num">1</span> of 10</div>
    <div class="wait-text">Wait…</div>
    <div class="hint-text">Tap when the screen turns green</div>
    <div id="rt-too-early" class="too-early-msg" style="display:none">Too early — wait for green!</div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Go ── -->
  <div id="rt-go" onclick="rtRecord()">
    <div class="big-label">Trial <span id="go-num">1</span> of 10</div>
    <div class="go-text">TAP!</div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Complete ── -->
  <div class="rt-screen" id="rt-complete">
    <h2>All done!</h2>
    <div class="times-grid" id="rt-all-times"></div>
    <p id="rt-save-status" style="font-size:0.9em; color:#aaa;">Saving your results…</p>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
const TOTAL = 10;
let rtName = '', rtDevice = '', rtTrial = 0, rtStart = null, rtResults = [], rtTimer = null, rtState = 'idle';

function rtShow(id) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.rt-screen, #rt-wait, #rt-go').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active');
}

function rtSetup() {
  rtName   = document.getElementById('rt-name').value.trim();
  rtDevice = document.getElementById('rt-device').value;
  if (!rtName || !rtDevice) { document.getElementById('rt-setup-err').style.display = 'block'; return; }
  document.getElementById('rt-setup-err').style.display = 'none';
  rtShow('rt-instructions');
}

function rtBegin() { rtTrial = 0; rtResults = []; rtNextTrial(); }

function rtNextTrial() {
  rtTrial++;
  document.getElementById('wait-num').textContent = rtTrial;
  document.getElementById('go-num').textContent   = rtTrial;
  document.getElementById('rt-too-early').style.display = 'none';
  rtState = 'waiting';
  rtShow('rt-wait');
  rtTimer = setTimeout(rtShowGo, 1500 + Math.random() * 3000);
}

function rtShowGo() {
  rtState = 'go';
  rtStart = performance.now();
  rtShow('rt-go');
}

function rtTooEarly() {
  if (rtState !== 'waiting') return;
  clearTimeout(rtTimer);
  document.getElementById('rt-too-early').style.display = 'block';
  setTimeout(() => {
    document.getElementById('rt-too-early').style.display = 'none';
    rtState = 'waiting';
    rtTimer = setTimeout(rtShowGo, 1500 + Math.random() * 3000);
  }, 1200);
}

function rtRecord() {
  if (rtState !== 'go') return;
  const rt = Math.round(performance.now() - rtStart);
  rtState = 'idle';
  rtResults.push(rt);
  if (rtTrial >= TOTAL) { rtComplete(); }
  else                  { rtNextTrial(); }
}

const SHEET_URL = 'https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbwAA0h3gteagmC1CyH4fjxaGu1NrxwOGulJNDmDWRaJOX0RwJnH8k4WfZOmKi8TSnp-/exec';

function rtComplete() {
  const list = document.getElementById('rt-all-times');
  list.innerHTML = '';
  rtResults.forEach((t, i) => {
    list.innerHTML += `<div class="time-row"><span class="t-num">Trial ${i+1}</span><span class="t-val">${t} ms</span></div>`;
  });
  rtShow('rt-complete');
  rtSave();
}

function rtSave() {
  const status = document.getElementById('rt-save-status');
  fetch(SHEET_URL, {
    method:  'POST',
    mode:    'no-cors',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body:    JSON.stringify({
      name:    rtName,
      device:  rtDevice,
      results: rtResults
    })
  })
  .then(() => {
    status.textContent = '✓ Results saved. Thank you!';
    status.style.color = '#2d6a4f';
    status.style.fontWeight = '600';
  })
  .catch(() => {
    status.textContent = 'Could not save — let your instructor know.';
    status.style.color = '#e63946';
  });
}
</script>
```
